nextStep: (1) Execute full fetch of 68 HTML files (~3-5 min @ 1 req/sec polite)
(2) Parse HTML to extract problem statement, classification, AlphaEvolve result
(3) Map each to Rei Typology (I-X) + D-FUMT₈ + lean4Candidate flag
(4) Identify subset that are Lean 4-formalizable (Paper 154 candidate pool)
(5) Update INDEX.json with totalExternalAi = 3 + 65 (excluding 3 already seeded)
(6) Add Tier 10 to v3.x META-DB spec
honestScope: Scaffold only. Full ingest deferred per "急がず ゆっくりと" rhythm — better to ingest carefully with per-problem fact-check than mass-fetch with hallucination risk.

patternCheck.pattern5_check: Rei does NOT claim AlphaEvolve work as its own. Tao framing: AlphaEvolve = hypothesis generator, Rei = proof completer.
patternCheck.antipattern5_check: NOT rejecting AlphaEvolve as "Google scale, unreachable". Real value: formal-verification layer Rei CAN provide (REI-PROVE 5-prover ensemble).
